title: Shared project.md renderer
goal: Extract renderProjectMd into a new src/state/projectMd.ts with optional Approach/Non-goals/Success fields, and have init.ts and import-gsd.ts import it so that with the optional fields omitted the output is byte-identical (existing init.test.ts and import-gsd.test.ts pass unchanged).

steps.title: Create src/state/projectMd.ts renderer
steps.detail: Export renderProjectMd({ name, what, forWhom, constraints, approach?, nonGoals?, success? }) + Fields type. Pure layout, no internal fallbacks. Section order name -> What I'm building -> Who it's for -> [Approach] -> [Non-goals] -> [Success criteria] -> Main constraints; optional sections rendered only when non-empty; single trailing newline.

steps.title: Unit test src/state/projectMd.test.ts
steps.detail: Covers: required-only output equals the exact current template string; each optional section renders in the right place when filled; empty/omitted optionals are dropped; Main constraints stays last with optionals present.

steps.title: Rewrite init.ts to use shared renderer
steps.detail: Delete local renderProjectMd (init.ts:155), import from ../state/projectMd.js, call with forWhom as-is and constraints || '(none)'. No optional fields passed.

steps.title: Rewrite import-gsd.ts to use shared renderer
steps.detail: Delete buildImportProjectMd (import-gsd.ts:149), import shared renderer, call with forWhom || '(not specified)' and constraints || '(none)'. No optional fields passed.

steps.title: Verify byte-identity: tests + build
steps.detail: npm test — init.test.ts and import-gsd.test.ts pass UNCHANGED (proof of byte-identity), new projectMd.test.ts passes; npm run build clean; status.ts untouched.
